title: Protected data collection in a multi-node network
abstract: Particular embodiments described herein provide for an electronic device that can be configured to receive a broadcast query from a network element, receive information from a plurality of devices, process the information, and generate an integrated group response, wherein the integrated group response summarizes the information about the plurality of devices and removes identification information that could allow data to be linked to a specific device from the plurality of devices. The integrated group response can be communicated back to the network element in response to the query.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. At least one machine readable medium comprising one or more instructions that when executed by at least one processor, cause the at least one processor to: receive a broadcast query from a network element; receive information from a plurality of devices; process the information; and generate an integrated group response, wherein the integrated group response summarizes the information about the plurality of devices and removes identification information that could allow data to be linked to a specific device from the plurality of devices. 2. The at least one machine readable medium of Claim 1, further comprising one or more instructions that when executed by the at least one processor, cause the at least one processor to: communicate the integrated group response to the network element. 3. The at least one machine readable medium of any of Claims 1 and 2, wherein the plurality of devices can communicate in a peer-to-peer communication network with each device passing a growing information block. 4. The at least one machine readable medium of any of Claims 1-3, wherein the peer to peer communication network is over secure communication channels. 5. The at least one machine readable medium of any of Claims 1-4, wherein the information is processed inside a trusted execution environment. 6. The at least one machine readable medium of any of Claims 1-5, wherein each of the plurality of devices satisfies a group filter included in the broadcast query. 7. The at least one computer-readable medium of any of Claims 1-6, wherein the query includes a response time out, wherein the response time out includes a predetermined amount of time and after the predetermined amount of time, the integrated group response is communicated to the network element. 8. An apparatus comprising: a device data collection engine, wherein the device data collection engine is configured to: receive a broadcast query from a network element; receive information from a plurality of devices; process the information; and 

 generate an integrated group response, wherein the integrated group response summarizes the information about the plurality of devices and removes identification information that could allow data to be linked to a specific device from the plurality of devices. 9. The apparatus of Claim 8, wherein the device data collection engine is further configured to: communicate the integrated group response to the network element. 10. The apparatus of any of Claims 8 and 9, wherein the plurality of devices can communicate in a peer-to-peer communication network with each device passing a growing information block. 11. The apparatus of any of Claims 8-10, wherein the peer to peer communication network is over secure communication channels. 12. The apparatus of any of Claims 8-11, wherein the information is processed inside a trusted execution environment. 13. The apparatus of any of Claims 8-12, wherein each of the plurality of devices satisfies a group filter included in the broadcast query. 14. The apparatus of any of Claims 8-13, wherein the query includes a response time out, wherein the response time out includes a predetermined amount of time and after the predetermined amount of time, the integrated group response is communicated to the network element. 15. A method comprising: receiving a broadcast query from a network element; receiving information from a plurality of devices; processing the information; and generating an integrated group response, wherein the integrated group response summarizes the information about the plurality of devices and removes identification information that could allow data to be linked to a specific device from the plurality of devices 16. The method of Claim 15, further comprising: communicating the integrated group response to the network element. 17. The method of any of Claims 15 and 16, wherein the plurality of devices can communicate in a peer-to-peer communication network with each device passing a growing information block. 18. The method of any of Claims 15-17, wherein the peer to peer communication network is over secure communication channels. 19. The method of any of Claims 15-18, wherein the information is processed inside a trusted execution environment. 20. The method of any of Claims 15-19, wherein each of the plurality of devices satisfies a group filter included in the broadcast query.
